===Listing Requirements===

# 基础信息

品牌名: BORNERWHITE
数量/包装:3个，红色/白色/蓝色三种颜色为一套
核心材质:涤纶，柔软绒面面料
颜色:红色/白色/蓝色三种颜色为一套
尺寸:18x18 inch
重量:450g





# 功能卖点

1. 材质：涤纶，柔软绒面面料，自然纯色。亲肤，不褪色，不磨损。
2. 隐形拉链及用途：我们采用高品质隐形拉链，提升外观优雅，拉链颜色与面料相匹配。这款枕套非常适合家居客厅、卧室、厨房、汽车、露台、椅子、沙发、办公室等场所的圣诞装饰，也是馈赠亲朋好友的可爱礼物。
3. 使用方便：将枕芯对折后塞入枕套，然后压平四个角，拉上拉链即可。非常简单。
4. 洗涤提示：请单独冷水机洗，选择轻柔模式，不可漂白。建议手洗或干洗。
5. 应用场景多：独立日场景，家居场景







# 产品细节信息

包装内含:红色/白色/蓝色三种颜色各一个的枕套为一套
适用场景:重点是独立日风格家居场景
设计特点:独立日星星图案

质量/安全认证:

# 分类

Home \& Kitchen›Bedding›Decorative Pillows, Inserts \& Covers›Throw Pillow Covers



# 特殊关键要求

适用场景最主要是独立日风格家居场景



五点内容：

套装包含（尺寸）

材质：涤纶，柔软绒面面料，自然纯色。亲肤，不褪色，不磨损，由于手工制作和缝制，请允许 0.5-1 英寸的误差

使用和洗涤提示：将枕芯对折后塞入枕套，然后压平四个角，拉上拉链即可。非常简单。请单独冷水机洗，选择轻柔模式，不可漂白。建议手洗或干洗。

隐形拉链：我们采用高品质隐形拉链，提升外观优雅，拉链颜色与面料相匹配

用途广泛：独立日风格家居场景，这款枕套非常适合家居客厅、卧室、厨房、汽车、露台、椅子、沙发、办公室等场所的圣诞装饰，也是馈赠亲朋好友的可爱礼物。





竞品的五点：

Polyester

MATERIAL:Polyester,Soft plush fabric with natural solid color.skin-friendly, no fading or abrasion.

Size \& Package Includes: 18x18 inch, Set of 2 pillow covers, PILLOW COVERS ONLY, NO PILLOW CORE.NOTE: Due to hand-made and sewing, please allow a deviation of 0.5-1 inch.

Hidden Zipper \& Application:We use a high-quality hidden zipper to enhance the elegant appearance and the color of the zipper matches the fabric.This is a perfect item for home living rooms, bedding, kitchen, car, patio,chair, sofa,bedrooms, offices christmas decor,It is a cute gift for your family and friends.

EASY TO PUT ON: Fold the full pillow core in half and stuff it into the pillowcase, then flatten the four corners and zip it up. Super easy.

WASHING TIPS: Machine wash in cold water separately, gently cycle only, do not bleach.Suggest hand washing or dry cleaning

Linen

【PACKAGE INCLUDES】Set of 4 patriotic pillow covers, perfect for adding festive charm to your patriotic decor.Please note: Inserts or fillers are not included.

【PILLOW COVERS 18x18】These 4th of July pillow covers measure 18x18 inches, making them a standard size for couch, sofa, bed, or living room decor.

【HIGH QUALITY \& EASY CARE】Made from high-quality linen material, these 4th of July outdoor pillow covers are durable, fade-resistant, and designed to last without color bleeding or fraying. Machine washable for effortless cleaning and long-lasting use.

【INVISIBLE ZIPPER \& WIDER OPENING】Featuring a hidden zipper closure, these patriotic pillow cases provide a seamless and refined look. The innovative wider opening design ensures a smooth and effortless experience, allowing you to achieve a flawless finish every time.

【PATRIOTIC DECORATIONS】Easily transform your home into a festive patriotic retreat with these red, white, and blue pillow covers, featuring a classic stars-and-stripes design.Whether for your couch, sofa, or outdoor seating, these summer throw pillow covers add a touch of elegance and festive charm to your patriotic decorations for the fourth of July.

Polyester \& Polyester Blend

DURABLE AND HIGHER QUALITY: Made of machine washable Polyester, comfortable \& soft touch, no bleeding, fading or fraying issue

MACHINE WASHABLE: Machine wash in cold water separately, gently cycle only, do not bleach. Stays the same and as new, after every wash

EASY TO PUT ON: Color coordinated invisible/hidden zipper closure for an elegant look, super easy to cram your pillow/filler into this cover

FEATURES: Welcome guests to your home with this unique, seasonal pillow cover. No Insert or Filler. Material: 100% Polyester

GREAT FOR HOME DECOR: Ultra softness feel, brings warm and modern look to your home decorative, living rooms, bedding, sofa, couch, toss, chair, bedrooms, offices, etc
